curation_notes: The patch modifies 4 non-test source files (src/vtab/mod.rs, src/vtab/array.rs, src/vtab/csvtab.rs, src/vtab/series.rs), making it a noisy patch. The core fix is in src/vtab/mod.rs where read_only_module and eponymous_only_module were changed to return &'static Module<T> instead of Module<T>, and create_module was changed to require &'static Module<T>. The other three files are consumers that were updated to pass inline function results instead of referencing lazy_static Module instances. Locations were derived from the patch diff, focusing on the mod.rs functions that define the vulnerable API.
